subject: [PORTAL] Fix ONAP Portal redirect to internal port
commit_message:
[PORTAL] Fix ONAP Portal redirect to internal port

Incorrect redirection to the login page.
Unlogged user after entering to
https://portal.api.simpledemo.onap.org:30225/ONAPPORTAL/app/applicationsHome
should be redirected to
https://portal.api.simpledemo.onap.org:30225/ONAPPORTAL/login.htm
instead of http://portal.api.simpledemo.onap.org:8989/ONAPPORTAL/login.htm

Issue-ID: PORTAL-1055
Signed-off-by: Marcin Rzepecki <marcin.rzepecki@nokia.com>
Change-Id: I48673fa45aea66f664e9c22107fcaef00305264a

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/235/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/235/ )

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/235/ )
